analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒主要受到晶片股價大幅上漲和美聯儲即將公布的PCE通膨報告的影響。韓國半導體股價大幅上漲，SK Hynix和三星電子股價分別上漲11.6%和6.2%，受到Micron的財報和預測影響。美聯儲即將公布的PCE通膨報告可能會讓華爾街感到放心，或是引發對美聯儲會加息的恐懼。同時，SpaceX的股價大幅下跌，可能迫使馬斯克採取極端措施。

【結語】
今天市場的情緒波動很大，投資者需要保持冷靜和耐心。不要被短期市場波動影響，長期投資才是最好的選擇。投資者需要了解自己的風險承受能力和投資目標，才能做出明智的決策。

【精選個股】
MU - Micron Technology - Micron Technology 表示其高階記憶體 (HBM) 市場潛力（TAM）將在 2027 年達到 1000 億美元。
VST - Vestas Wind Systems - 維斯塔是一家公用事業公司，公司的績效受到其業務穩定性和營運效率的影響。
FRC - First Republic Bank - 費爾艾薩克公司的盈利成長表現亮眼，評估價格再次變得吸引人。
風險提醒：投資者需要了解自己的風險承受能力和投資目標，才能做出明智的決策。

items.title: American Express Caters to Affluent Spenders. Can That Cushion It If the Consumer Cracks?
items.summary: There's a reason that American Express is one of Warren Buffett's favorite stocks.
items.zh_title: 美國運通迎合高收入消費者。能否藉此抵禦消費者崩盤？
items.zh_point: 美國運通是華倫巴菲特最喜愛的股票之一。

items.title: Could a $25,000 Investment in Nvidia Stock Make You a Millionaire?
items.summary: If you had invested that much in the chipmaker 10 years ago and held on, your stake would be worth more than $4 million today.
items.zh_title: 投資25萬美元在Nvidia股票是否能讓你成為百萬富翁？
items.zh_point: 如果你10年前投資25萬美元在Nvidia這家晶片製造商，並持續持有，現在你的股份將值超過4000萬美元。

items.title: South Korean chip shares surge after Micron flags strong AI-related demand
items.summary: South Korean semiconductor shares rallied on Thursday after U.S. memory chipmaker Micron ‌Technology's quarterly results and forecast beat expectations, boosting optimism ‌over sustained demand for AI-related chips. Shares of SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics rose ​as much as 11.6% and 6.2%, respectively, in early trade, tracking a rally in U.S. chip stocks after Micron's earnings and outlook reinforced confidence in the memory sector. The rally also followed SK ‌Hynix's announcement on Wednesday ⁠of plans to raise up to 45.45 trillion won ($29.52 billion) through a secondary listing on Nasdaq,
items.zh_title: 韓國晶片股價大幅上漲　微軟旗下Micron強勁AI相關需求預測
items.zh_point: 韓國半導體股價大幅上漲，SK Hynix和三星電子股價分別上漲11.6%和6.2%，跟隨美國晶片股價大幅上漲，受到Micron的財報和預測影響，強化對記憶體行業的信心。

items.title: SpaceX’s 32% crash may force Musk into radical move
items.summary: Less than two weeks ago, SpaceX became the most valuable company ever to go public, raising $75 billion at a valuation north of $1.7 trillion and closing its debut session up 19%, according to CNBC. On June 22, SpaceX posted its worst single-day loss as a public company, plunging 16% to close at ...
items.zh_title: SpaceX 32% 大跌可能迫使馬斯克採取極端措施
items.zh_point: SpaceX 在剛剛不到兩週前以 1.7 萬億美元的市值成為史上最貴值的上市公司，籌集 7.5 萬億美元融資，首日上市收盤上漲 19%，根據 CNBC 報導。6 月 22 日，SpaceX 作為上市公司的單日最大跌幅，下跌 16% 收盤。

items.title: Why MoonLake Immunotherapeutics Stock Wilted on Wednesday
items.summary: The biotech is floating a relatively sizable secondary share issue.
items.zh_title: 為什麼MoonLake Immunotherapeutics股價下跌
items.zh_point: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics正在籌措一筆相對較大的次級股票發行，股價因此下跌。

items.title: How much does debt settlement cost?
items.summary: A debt settlement company could substantially lower your credit card bills. Find out what (and how) they charge for their services.
items.zh_title: 債務協議的費用有多少？
items.zh_point: 債務協議公司可能能大幅降低你的信用卡帳單，但你需要了解他們的服務費用是什麼，以及他們如何收費。

items.title: SK Hynix surges 11% after filing for blockbuster Nasdaq listing
items.summary: Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 11% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29.4 billion.
items.zh_title: SK Hynix 突破11% 上市申請後大躍進
items.zh_point: SK Hynix 股價大幅上升11%，公司宣布申請納斯達克上市，籌集高達294億美元。

items.title: Buildings collapse as quakes rock Venezuela, 'high casualties' likely
items.summary: A magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck about 160 km (100 miles) west of Caracas, with a magnitude 7.5 tremor hitting less than a minute later, according to the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS).
items.zh_title: 委內瑞拉發生強震，多處建築物倒塌，傷亡慘重
items.zh_point: 委內瑞拉發生7.2級地震，接著不到一分鐘又有7.5級地震，美國地質調查局估計傷亡慘重。

items.title: Inside India newsletter: Meet the humans teaching robots to perform routine tasks, as India finds a way to enter the AI race
items.summary: Several companies have cropped up in India providing video training data made by humans that is being used to teach robots in the U.S. and China.
items.zh_title: 印度新聞簡訊：印度人教導機器人完成日常任務，進入人工智慧競賽
items.zh_point: 印度出現多家公司，提供由人類錄製的視頻資料，用於在美國和中國教導機器人。

items.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: A decline in chip stocks dragged down the Nasdaq Composite on Wednesday. The S&P 500 ended the session slightly lower.
items.zh_title: 週四的大股市新聞：什麼可能影響明天的市場走勢
items.zh_point: 晶片股下跌拖累了納斯達克指數，標準普爾 500 指數在週三結束時略微下跌。

items.title: Why SK Hynix’s $30 billion U.S. listing could be a double-edged sword for Micron’s stock
items.summary: The South Korean memory company could give investors more opportunities beyond Micron, though it may also raise awareness of industry dynamics.
items.zh_title: SK Hynix 美股上市將對 Micron 股價造成雙重影響
items.zh_point: SK Hynix 美股上市可能為投資者提供更多投資機會，但也可能使投資者更了解記憶體產業的動態。

items.title: These hidden PCE triggers could force a Fed rate hike — and shock the market
items.summary: The PCE inflation report will either calm Wall Street or ignite fears of a restrictive Fed.
items.zh_title: 這些隱藏的PCE觸發器可能迫使美聯儲加息 — 並震驚市場
items.zh_point: 美聯儲即將公布的PCE通膨報告可能會讓華爾街感到放心，或是引發對美聯儲會加息的恐懼。

items.title: Everyone on Wall Street now believes in buying the dip. That is exactly why you should worry.
items.summary: A strategy that feels like free money actually lags the stock market over the long term.
items.zh_title: 華爾街現在每個人都相信買跌，正是你應該擔心的時候
items.zh_point: 買跌策略雖然看似賺到白菜價，但實際上在長期內會落後於股市表現。

items.title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
items.summary: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it.”
items.zh_title: 我房客在桌子上留下了熱印，直到她走了我才發現。該問她賠償嗎？
items.zh_point: 房客在出租屋的桌子上留下熱印，房東發現後該如何處理？

items.title: I had gallbladder surgery. After I got home, the hospital asked me for a financial donation. Is this ethical?
items.summary: “The letter asked whether I had a favorite caregiver and if I would like to make a contribution in their honor.”
items.zh_title: 我在家中康復後，醫院竟然要求我捐款
items.zh_point: 一名病人在完成膽囊手術後，回家後收到醫院的捐款請求信，引發對醫院行為的道德疑慮。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下滑，受中國DeepSeek影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大部分下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，人工智慧基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，包括Nvidia下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所的金價和銀價分別下跌1.4%和2.5%，連續兩天和四天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過於誇大。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊業最新動態
items.zh_point: 深入探討DeepSeek、SoFi等科技、媒體和通訊業的最新發展。

items.title: Micron signals HBM TAM crossing $100B in 2027 as it lifts FY26 CapEx to around $27B
items.zh_title: Micron signals HBM TAM 跨越 $100B 的里程碑將在 2027 年達成，同時提升 FY26 年度投資額約為 $27B
items.zh_point: Micron Technology 表示其高階記憶體 (HBM) 市場潛力（TAM）將在 2027 年達到 1000 億美元，公司也宣布提升 2026 年度投資額至約 2700 億美元。

items.title: Micron Technology, Inc. (MU) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
items.zh_title: Micron Technology, Inc. (MU) 2026 年第三季度財報電話會議記錄
items.zh_point: Micron Technology 公布 2026 年第三季度財報，財報內容未知。

items.title: Vistra: A Solid Utility Story With Limited Margin For Error
items.zh_title: 維斯塔：堅實的公用事業故事，但犯錯的餘地有限
items.zh_point: 維斯塔是一家公用事業公司，公司的績效受到其業務穩定性和營運效率的影響。雖然維斯塔的業務穩定性較高，但公司的利潤率有限，任何錯誤都可能對公司造成重大影響。

items.title: Fair Isaac: Strong Earnings Growth Makes The Valuation Attractive Again
items.zh_title: 費爾艾薩克：強勁的盈利成長使評估價格再次吸引人
items.zh_point: 費爾艾薩克公司的盈利成長表現亮眼，評估價格再次變得吸引人，投資者開始關注其未來發展。

items.title: Micron projects fiscal Q4 revenue of $50B ± $1B as it outlines $100B in SCA RPO
items.zh_title: Micron 預估財政 Q4 收入 500 億美元 ± 100 億美元，同時公佈 1000 億美元的 SCA RPO
items.zh_point: Micron 公佈財政 Q4 收入預估，同時表示將投資 1000 億美元於 SCA RPO 項目，預計將對公司業務帶來重大影響。

items.title: Trump meets munitions makers amid push to replenish weapons stockpiles
items.zh_title: 特朗普會見彈藥製造商　擴充武器儲備
items.zh_point: 特朗普政府正致力於補充武器儲備，特朗普與彈藥製造商會面，表明政府對軍事補給的重視。

items.title: Form 4 Patrick Industries Inc For: 24 June
items.zh_title: Patrick Industries Inc 2023 年 6 月 24 日表現
items.zh_point: Patrick Industries Inc 於 2023 年 6 月 24 日發布了最新的財務報告，內容尚未披露。

items.zh_title: Omada Health Inc 24 日表單 4
items.zh_point: Omada Health Inc 於 2024 年 6 月 24 日提交了表單 4，內容未有明確摘要。
